case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ROSA DE LOURDES RAMIREZ MUNOZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ MUNOZ, ROSA DE LOURDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ MUNOZ, ROSA DE LOURDES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2019 - SOFIA REYES AS LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY WOHL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
